eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Standard supply chain process with no identified high-risk characteristics

gaps: No documented AI policy, objectives or leadership accountability framework
Missing AI-specific risk assessment, impact assessment and bias evaluation processes
Insufficient transparency, explainability and human oversight mechanisms beyond basic escalation rules
No evidence of continual improvement, internal audit or performance evaluation processes
recommendations: Establish formal AI management system policies and objectives per ISO/IEC 42001 Clause 5-6
Implement systematic AI risk and impact assessments covering all compliance flags
Add decision explainability and enhanced human-in-the-loop controls for high-risk routing decisions
Define measurable KPIs, monitoring procedures and management review cycles aligned with the standard

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: minimal. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No documented AI policy, objectives or leadership accountability framework
